title: Staff Chaplain - Oncology & Palliative Care
keywords: chaplaincy pastoral-care oncology palliative-care APC board-certified CPE
description: Bluff City Medical Center is seeking a Staff Chaplain to provide spiritual care across the oncology and palliative care units. The ideal candidate holds board certification (or eligibility) through the Association of Professional Chaplains and has completed CPE training. This role is part of an interdisciplinary care team and includes rotating on-call coverage.

title: Director of Pastoral Care
keywords: pastoral-care chaplaincy leadership hospital APC CPE-supervision
description: Golden Heart Medical Center seeks an experienced Director of Pastoral Care to lead its chaplaincy department. Candidates must be Board Certified through the APC, with demonstrated experience in CPE supervision and team leadership. Responsibilities include program oversight, interdisciplinary collaboration, and mentorship of chaplaincy residents.

title: CPE Residency Program Coordinator
description: Regional One Health's CPE Program is seeking a Coordinator to support residency administration, curriculum tracking, and trainee support. Experience in chaplaincy or clinical pastoral education preferred. This is an opportunity to shape the next generation of hospital chaplains in the Mid-South.

title: Community Outreach & Health Ministry Coordinator
keywords: community-health outreach faith-based ministry church health-fair
description: Grace Community Church Memphis is seeking a part-time Coordinator to assist with health ministry programming including the annual Community Health Fair, congregational wellness initiatives, and community outreach events. Background in public health, ministry, or social work preferred.

title: Hospice Chaplain
keywords: chaplaincy hospice palliative-care end-of-life spiritual-care APC
description: APC-affiliated hospice organization in the Nashville metro area seeks a Board Certified Chaplain or BCC candidate for a full-time hospice chaplain role. Experience with end-of-life care, grief support, and interdisciplinary team collaboration required. Remote-eligible for home visit caseloads.

title: Faith & Wellness Radio Host (Part-Time Contract)
keywords: radio host faith wellness broadcasting community Memphis inspirational
description: WMQM Memphis Gospel Radio is seeking an experienced faith-and-wellness radio host to fill a Saturday morning programming slot. Candidates should have on-air experience, strong communication skills, and deep roots in the Memphis faith community. Production and audio editing experience a plus.

title: Adjunct Instructor - Pastoral Theology & Care
keywords: theology pastoral-care teaching MDiv divinity adjunct instructor
description: Memphis Divinity School invites applications for adjunct instructors in Pastoral Theology and Clinical Pastoral Care. MDiv required; DMin or equivalent advanced study preferred. Candidates should have active ministry or chaplaincy experience and a commitment to equipping the next generation of pastoral leaders.

title: Grief Support Group Facilitator (Part-Time)
keywords: grief support facilitation counseling community social-work mental-health
description: Memphis Youth Services is seeking a part-time Grief Support Group Facilitator to lead weekly groups for youth who have experienced loss. Background in counseling, social work, chaplaincy, or pastoral care preferred. Trauma-informed facilitation experience a plus.

title: Nursing Faculty - Community Health (Full-Time)
keywords: nursing faculty community-health education professor RN healthcare
description: Bluff City Community College is hiring a full-time Nursing Faculty member specializing in Community Health. Candidates must hold an active RN license and a graduate degree in nursing or a related field. Experience in clinical practice and healthcare education preferred.

title: Spiritual Care Volunteer Coordinator
keywords: volunteer coordinator spiritual-care chaplaincy hospital faith community
description: Bluff City Medical Center's Pastoral Care department is seeking a Spiritual Care Volunteer Coordinator to recruit, train, and schedule faith community volunteers supporting patients and families. Background in chaplaincy, ministry, or volunteer management preferred. Reports to the Director of Pastoral Care.
